results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve Board - Implementation Note issued April 29, 2026
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board - Trump's legal attacks have 'left me no choice'
Fed's Interest Rate Decision: April 29, 2026 - dshort - Advisor Perspectives
Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged as Powell's chairmanship nears end
Fed meeting live updates: Fed holds rates steady, Chair Powell to remain at central bank with a 'low profile'

summary: FOMC held rates at 3.5%-3.75% on April 29, 2026 (third consecutive hold). Unusual 8-4 split - last time 4 dissenters was Oct 1992. Gov Miran wanted -25bps; Hammack, Kashkari, Logan held but opposed easing bias. Inflation elevated partly from energy price spike. Powell remains on Board of Governors; Kevin Warsh expected as next Fed Chair pending Senate vote.
